iterations.change: Added getItemLayout prop to FeedScreen's FlatList — each item is a fixed 96px card
Wrapped FeedItem component in React.memo with a custom areEqual comparator

iterations.hypothesis: Move avatar image decoding off-thread with Image.resolveAssetSource
iterations.change: Pre-decoded avatar URIs in a useEffect so the render cycle doesn't stall on image decode

iterations.hypothesis: Replace inline style objects with StyleSheet.create
iterations.change: Moved all inline style objects in FeedItem to StyleSheet.create at module level

iterations.hypothesis: Add keyExtractor returning item.id instead of index
iterations.change: Changed keyExtractor from default (index) to (item) => item.id to prevent full re-renders on data updates
